description: A white Benz sedan viewed from the side in bright daytime light (image appears clear). The vehicle shows new wear with tinted curved windows. It features off oval headlights and angular taillights, complemented by a horizontal grille with rounded edges. The clean sloped roof sits above new medium street tires with intact bumpers. Side mirrors are intact. License plate is visible. Spoiler is not present. Roof rack is not present. Exhaust system features hidden pipes.
